title: isotria affinis
intro: Isotria affinis, also known as the Eastern Small Whitetongue Orchid, is a rare and endangered species of orchid native to the southeastern United States. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly in the treatment of respiratory issues and inflammation, due to its high concentration of flavonoids and other bioactive compounds. Isotria affinis has been traditionally used to treat coughs, colds, and sore throats, as well as to reduce fever and alleviate symptoms of bronchitis. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are often used in traditional medicine to promote overall health and well-being.
